title: 小鲨鱼pvp材质包Sharky PvP Texture Pack
description:
实用简约的pvp起床战争材质包，持续更新中——小鲨鱼工作室出品
A practical and minimalist PvP Bed Wars resource pack, continuously updated — produced by sharky workshop
body:
# 材质包功能介绍
本材质包根据**pvp和起床战争**的需求制作，**由B站up主： 小鲨鱼工作室 制作**。主打**简约和实用**，更改了游戏以下材质：
- 武器（剑，斧子)
- 钓鱼竿粒子效果
- 羊毛的边框效果
- 细雪
- gui游戏界面（半透明方便观察敌人）
- 起床战争物资的材质（铁锭，下界合金）
- 火焰在视野中的高度

# 版本适配
·**最佳版本（1.8.9~1.21.8）**
·在最新版本中（1.21.11）gui界面半透明效果无法加载,其他功能正常。小鲨鱼会尽快适配新版本

# 鸣谢
**本材质包将不断更新**，希望能提供更好的pvp体验，感谢支持 
在https://space.bilibili.com/1921189568 反馈问题，作者最近时间紧张，更新适配可能较慢，但小鲨鱼会尽力的

# Resource Pack Features Introduction
This resource pack is made according to the needs of **PvP and Bed Wars**, **created by Bilibili uploader: 小鲨鱼工作室**. It focuses on **simplicity and practicality**, and changes the following game textures:
- Weapons (swords, axes)
- Fishing rod particle effects
- Wool border effects
- Fine snow
- GUI (semi-transparent to easily observe enemies)
- Bed Wars materials (iron ingots, netherite ingots)
- Fire height in the field of view

# Version Compatibility
· **Best versions (1.8.9~1.21.8)**
· In the latest version (1.21.11), the GUI semi-transparent effect works, but other functions can be loaded normally. Sharky will adapt to the new version as soon as possible.

# Acknowledgements
**This resource pack will be continuously updated**, aiming to provide a better PvP experience. Thank you for your support. Feedback can be given at https://space.bilibili.com/1921189568. The author is currently busy, so updates and adaptations may be slow, but Sharky will do his best.
